task_text: Look at the sprint 14 assignments and testing log, then tell me which tasks are at risk of missing the sprint deadline. Write your assessment to sprint14_deadline_risk.txt.

---------|-------------------------------------------|-------------------|--------|------------|------------
HEL-241  | Dashboard: data table component           | Fatima Al-Rashid  | 5      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress
HEL-242  | Dashboard: chart rendering module         | Tomas Rivera      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | In Progress

HEL-248  | GeoSync license renewal coordination      | Raj Patel         | 2      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress

Project Helios — QA Testing Log: Sprint 14
QA Engineer: Kenji Watanabe
Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-11 (ongoing)

=== Test Suite: Authentication Flows ===
TC-401  OAuth token issuance              PASS
TC-402  Token refresh                     PASS
TC-403  Expired token rejection           PASS
TC-404  Invalid scope rejection           PASS
Suite result: 4/4 PASS

=== Test Suite: Data Pipeline — Batch Ingestion ===
TC-501  CSV ingestion (10k records)                  PASS
TC-502  JSON ingestion (10k records)                 PASS
TC-503  XML ingestion (5k records)                   PASS
TC-504  Date normalization (ISO 8601 input)          PASS
TC-505  Date normalization (MM/DD/YYYY input)        FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-014]
TC-506  Duplicate record detection                   PASS
TC-507  Large file ingestion (500k records)          FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-015]
Suite result: 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL

=== Test Suite: Dashboard ===
TC-601  Data table rendering (10k records)           PASS
TC-602  Chart rendering — line chart                 IN PROGRESS
TC-603  Chart rendering — bar chart                  NOT RUN
TC-604  Load time benchmark (100k records)           NOT RUN
Suite result: 1/4 complete

=== Open Defects ===
HEL-D-014  Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input format.
           Affects ~40% of Meridian source data. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Blocked pending Meridian sample data (due 2026-07-15).

HEL-D-015  Large file ingestion (>200k records) causes memory overflow.
           Pipeline crashes at approximately 210k record mark. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Root cause under investigation.

Overall sprint 14 test status: 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 not yet run.

input.content:
Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Source files reviewed: sprint_14_task_assignments.txt and helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt
Sprint window: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Assessment date: 2026-07-11

Tasks at risk of missing the sprint deadline:

1. HEL-243 — Data ingestion: date format normalization
   Assignee: Amir Hassan
   Due: 2026-07-15
   Risk level: HIGH
   Rationale: The task is marked Blocked. Testing shows open high-severity defect HEL-D-014: MM/DD/YYYY date normalization fails and affects approximately 40% of Meridian source data. The defect is blocked pending Meridian sample data due 2026-07-15, the same day as the task due date, leaving little or no time for fix and retest within the sprint.

2. HEL-245 — Integration test suite: data pipeline
   Assignee: Kenji Watanabe
   Due: 2026-07-18
   Risk level: HIGH
   Rationale: The task is In Progress, and the data pipeline suite is only 5/7 passing. Two high-severity defects remain open: HEL-D-014 for date normalization and HEL-D-015 for large file ingestion memory overflow. Until these defects are resolved, the integration suite cannot be completed successfully by the sprint deadline.

3. HEL-246 — UAT environment: server provisioning
   Assignee: Nadia Petrov
   Due: 2026-07-16
   Risk level: HIGH
   Rationale: The task is explicitly marked At Risk with a due date two days before sprint end. No testing evidence in the log indicates completion or validation of the UAT environment, so this remains a deadline risk.

4. HEL-247 — Performance benchmark: dashboard load
   Assignee: Derek Okafor
   Due: 2026-07-18
   Risk level: MEDIUM-HIGH
   Rationale: The task is Not Started. The related dashboard load time benchmark test, TC-604, is Not Run. Because this work depends on dashboard readiness and requires benchmark execution before sprint end, it is at risk unless started soon.

5. HEL-242 — Dashboard: chart rendering module
   Assignee: Tomas Rivera
   Due: 2026-07-16
   Risk level: MEDIUM
   Rationale: The task is In Progress, and related dashboard chart tests are incomplete: line chart rendering is In Progress and bar chart rendering is Not Run. With a 2026-07-16 due date, remaining implementation and testing create schedule risk.

Watchlist / lower risk:

- HEL-241 — Dashboard: data table component: In Progress and due 2026-07-14, but the related data table rendering test has passed, so risk appears lower than the items above.
- HEL-248 — GeoSync license renewal coordination: In Progress and due 2026-07-14. There is no direct testing signal, but the near-term due date makes it worth monitoring.
- HEL-244 — Integration test suite: auth flows: Done, with 4/4 authentication flow tests passing; not at risk.

Summary: Highest deadline risks are HEL-243, HEL-245, and HEL-246. HEL-247 and HEL-242 also need attention due to not-started or incomplete test coverage. The main blocking issues are the two open high-severity data pipeline defects and the blocked status of date normalization work.

content.text: Done. I wrote the assessment to `sprint14_deadline_risk.txt`.
